userStories.title: Map all official EUR-Lex and ESMA sources for market regulation domains
acceptanceCriteria: Document official sources for MiFID II, MiFIR, MiCA, DLT Pilot and MAR
Document ESMA MiFIR reporting hub, transaction reporting schemas, FIRDS/FITRS registers and DLT Pilot page
For each source record url, format, size/update notes and STATUS-A/D/E classification
Write docs/eurlex-esma-market-coverage-map.md
Flag which CELEX texts already have articulado loaded and which ESMA schemas are new
Do not load data in this story

userStories.title: Alembic migrations for all new EUR-Lex and ESMA tables
acceptanceCriteria: Check existing schema before migration
Create Alembic migration for missing eurlex/esma tables
Do not use runtime DDL
Apply to test DB before production
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema='public' AND table_name IN ('eurlex_act','eurlex_article','esma_reporting_document','esma_schema','esma_schema_field','esma_validation_rule','esma_firds_file','esma_firds_instrument','esma_fitrs_result','esma_dlt_market_infrastructure','esma_dlt_exemption')"); [ "$COUNT" -eq 11 ] && alembic heads | grep -q '20260513_0074_eurlex_esma_market_tables' && echo PASS || echo FAIL-TABLES-MISSING

userStories.title: Load EUR-Lex MiFIR full articulado - CELEX 32014R0600
acceptanceCriteria: Download official EUR-Lex MiFIR text
Parse all articles into eurlex_act/eurlex_article
Store source_url, source_hash and capture_date
Expose real article text through API/MCP
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM eurlex_article WHERE act_id=(SELECT id FROM eurlex_act WHERE celex='32014R0600')"); echo "MiFIR articles: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -gt 10 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL-NO-MIFIR-ARTICLES

userStories.title: Load EUR-Lex MiCA full articulado - CELEX 32023R1114
acceptanceCriteria: Download official EUR-Lex MiCA text
Parse articles and recitals safely
Store traceability and mark complete only when article coverage is complete
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM eurlex_article WHERE act_id=(SELECT id FROM eurlex_act WHERE celex='32023R1114')"); echo "MiCA articles: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -gt 50 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL-NO-MICA-ARTICLES

userStories.title: Load EUR-Lex DLT Pilot Regulation - CELEX 32022R0858
acceptanceCriteria: Download official EUR-Lex DLT Pilot text
Parse articles into dedicated EUR-Lex market tables
Preserve full source traceability
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM eurlex_article WHERE act_id=(SELECT id FROM eurlex_act WHERE celex='32022R0858')"); echo "DLT Pilot articles: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -gt 10 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL-NO-DLT-ARTICLES

userStories.title: Load ESMA MiFIR Transaction Reporting XML Schema 1.1.0
acceptanceCriteria: Download official ESMA transaction reporting ZIP/XSD
Parse XSD elements as schema fields
Never infer fields from prose
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM esma_schema_field sf JOIN esma_schema s ON sf.schema_id=s.id WHERE s.dominio='TRANSACTION_REPORTING'"); echo "MiFIR TR fields: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -gt 0 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL-NO-MIFIR-SCHEMA-FIELDS

userStories.title: Load ESMA MiFIR reporting documents - RTS 22, ITS, Q&A
acceptanceCriteria: Load ESMA reporting document metadata
Extract validation rules only if structured
Keep unstructured PDFs as metadata/evidence_limited
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; $COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM esma_reporting_document WHERE dominio='MIFIR';" && echo PASS

userStories.title: Load FIRDS file list and metadata - pilot only
acceptanceCriteria: Load FIRDS file metadata
Pilot one recent delta file only
Do not load full FULINS history without separate capacity decision
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; FILE_COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc 'SELECT COUNT(*) FROM esma_firds_file'); INSTR_COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc 'SELECT COUNT(*) FROM esma_firds_instrument'); echo "FIRDS files: $FILE_COUNT, instruments: $INSTR_COUNT"; [ "$FILE_COUNT" -gt 0 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL-NO-FIRDS-DATA

userStories.title: Load ESMA DLT authorised market infrastructures
acceptanceCriteria: Load structured DLT infrastructure list if published
If zero authorisations exist, document configured_but_unavailable honestly
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; $COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM esma_dlt_market_infrastructure;" && echo PASS

userStories.title: Harden CASP/MiCA register - verify existing data and fill gaps
acceptanceCriteria: Verify CASP source freshness and provenance
Reload if stale
Keep non-CASP MiCA tables fail-closed unless official structured data exists
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; $COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -c "SELECT COUNT(*), MAX(capture_date) FROM casp WHERE verified=true;" && echo PASS

userStories.title: Create workers for EUR-Lex and ESMA scheduled refresh
acceptanceCriteria: Create scheduled workers for EUR-Lex market texts, ESMA MiFIR reporting and ESMA FIRDS metadata
Register cadence and sync_log telemetry
userStories.verificationCommand: test -f apps/workers/worker_eurlex_market.py && test -f apps/workers/worker_esma_mifir_reporting.py && test -f apps/workers/worker_esma_firds.py && grep -c 'worker-eurlex-market\|worker-esma-mifir\|worker-esma-firds' apps/config/workers.py | grep -vE '^0$' && echo PASS || echo FAIL-WORKERS-MISSING

userStories.title: Expose EUR-Lex and ESMA endpoints in API and MCP
acceptanceCriteria: Expose market EUR-Lex, ESMA MiFIR schema, FIRDS and DLT endpoints
All endpoints include verified/completeness and query audit
userStories.verificationCommand: curl -sf http://localhost:${API_PORT:-8000}/v1/eurlex/market/acts | jq '.total' | grep -vE '^0$' && curl -sf http://localhost:${API_PORT:-8000}/v1/esma/mifir/schemas | jq '.total' && echo PASS || echo FAIL-ENDPOINTS-NOT-RESPONDING

userStories.title: Expand mcp_validation_suite and mcp_deep_contract_audit for new domains
acceptanceCriteria: Add MiFIR/MiCA/DLT/ESMA/FIRDS checks to both suites
Validate fail-closed behavior for incomplete FIRDS/DLT data
userStories.verificationCommand: docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml run --rm worker python mcp_validation_suite.py 2>&1 | grep 'ok=true' && docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml run --rm worker python mcp_deep_contract_audit.py 2>&1 | grep 'ok=true' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Final coverage report - EUR-Lex + ESMA markets sprint
acceptanceCriteria: Write docs/eurlex-esma-coverage-report.md
Document records loaded and contracts per domain
Confirm status, alerting and audit suites
userStories.verificationCommand: test -f docs/eurlex-esma-coverage-report.md && curl -sf http://localhost:${API_PORT:-8000}/status | jq '{api, db, stale_workers_count}' | grep -v 'null' && echo PASS || echo FAIL
